scripts.dev: npm run assets:sync && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro dev
scripts.build: npm run assets:sync && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build
scripts.preview: npm run assets:sync && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro preview
scripts.check: npm run data:check:strict && npm run content:check && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro check
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run build
